title: OpenClaw → Swarmstr port (Nostr-first)
Phase 0: Foundation scaffold
Define event kind/tag model and envelopes
Implement bootstrap config loader and validation
Scaffold CLI/daemon entrypoints
Phase 1: Relay runtime + DM loop
Implement relay manager (connect/reconnect/sub/pub)
Implement inbound DM subscription and decryption
Implement outbound DM send path
Phase 2: Nostr state persistence + DM policy
Implement Nostr-backed replaceable state store
Persist config/lists/sessions to Nostr
Implement DM policy modes
Phase 3: Transcript + agent integration
Persist transcript entries as parameterized docs
Integrate agent runtime loop
Add idempotency/checkpoint recovery
Phase 4: Nostr memory + local index
Design memory event schema and retrieval tags
Build local searchable cache/index
Nostr checkpoint sync for index
Phase 5: Optional admin API + parity
Implement optional local admin API
Add OpenClaw parity surface incrementally
Operational hardening and observability
Parity phase B: agents/models/tools/skills surfaces
description: Implement OpenClaw gateway parity for agent, agent.wait, agent.identity.get, agents.* CRUD/file methods, models.list, tools.catalog, and skills status/install/update endpoints. Preserve Swarmstr Nostr-native state persistence for agent/session artifacts.

title: Parity phase C: node/device pairing, cron, exec approvals, wizard, talk/voicewake/tts
description: Implement OpenClaw parity method families for node/device pairing and token lifecycle, node invoke/event/result/canvas capability, cron scheduling/status/runs, exec approval workflows, wizard flow, talk.mode/config, voicewake, tts providers/config/convert, and secrets reload/resolve.

title: Websocket event-stream parity and contract alignment
description: Align Swarmstr WS event catalog and payload contracts with OpenClaw expectations (agent/chat/presence/tick/health/heartbeat/cron/pairing/update-available) while preserving Nostr-backed control semantics and existing connect-policy hardening.

title: Channel/plugin compatibility profile for parity boundary
description: Define and implement a compatibility profile for OpenClaw channel/plugin-dependent gateway methods in Swarmstr. Ship explicit supported/not-supported responses and adapters for core channel status/logout surfaces without introducing full plugin runtime parity yet.

title: Parity matrix, OpenClaw fixture tests, and CI gating
description: Build a living parity matrix (OpenClaw method/event/auth semantics vs Swarmstr), add cross-implementation fixture tests for WS + RPC + auth + precondition semantics, and gate merges on parity suite deltas.

title: Complete swarmstr-9 remaining deep parity semantics
description: Follow-up for swarmstr-9: implement non-stub semantics for logs.tail/channels.status/channels.logout/usage.status/usage.cost, add full sessions mutation methods (sessions.patch/reset/delete/compact), and wire chat.abort to real runtime cancellation behavior.
notes: Completed non-stub runtime semantics for logs.tail/channels.status/channels.logout/usage.status/usage.cost across both Nostr control RPC and admin /call. Wired daemon runtime callbacks (log ring buffer, channel runtime state, usage tracker), propagated control call accounting + abort accounting, and added tests in cmd/swarmstrd/main_test.go and internal/admin/server_test.go. Full go test ./... passing.

title: Post-port enhancements (security + parity + runtime depth)
Encrypt persisted Nostr docs (NIP-44 target)
Add envelope encryption/decryption primitives for state/transcript/memory
Migrate docs repos to encrypted payloads with compatibility fallback
Harden metadata leakage policy for tags/session/source
Richer agent runtime integration
Replace echo runtime with provider-backed agent loop
Add tool-call execution and transcript wiring
close_reason: Implemented tool execution in provider runtime and persisted tool traces into transcript entries

title: Add per-session context assembly using memory index
close_reason: Added per-session memory context assembly from memory index and wired it into turn processing

title: Expanded OpenClaw parity methods
Define gateway-style method surface and request/response schemas
close_reason: Defined canonical gateway method schemas and decoders, including object and positional params

title: Implement first parity bundle (status/config/chat/memory methods)
close_reason: Implemented parity method handlers for status/config/chat/session/memory (plus list methods) on admin and control surfaces

title: Add compatibility tests against OpenClaw behavior contracts
close_reason: Added compatibility-focused tests for method decoding and dispatch behavior

title: Nostr-native control/data plane convergence
description: Next wave: strengthen relay-native semantics for control/auth/state convergence and persistent coordination over Nostr.

title: State/list convergence and relay conflict handling
description: Define deterministic merge semantics for replaceable docs/lists across relays and expose list state operations for control surfaces.

title: Define convergence semantics for replaceable state docs
description: Specify and enforce deterministic winner selection/tie-breaking and stale-write safeguards for config/list/session docs.
close_reason: Implemented deterministic replaceable-event winner semantics (created_at then ID) and added convergence unit tests

title: Implement optimistic state version checks for config/list writes
description: Add optional expected-version/expected-event preconditions to prevent accidental overwrite from stale callers.
close_reason: Added optimistic write preconditions (expected_version/expected_event) for config.put and list.put across control and admin method surfaces

title: Add conformance tests for multi-relay state convergence
description: Add unit tests validating deterministic behavior under out-of-order relay observations.
close_reason: Added conformance tests for deterministic event ordering and precondition conflict behavior

title: Control RPC per-caller rate limiting
description: Add lightweight in-memory abuse controls to limit rapid control RPC bursts from a single caller.

title: Implement per-caller control RPC throttle
description: Track recent caller activity and reject requests that exceed configured minimum interval.
close_reason: Implemented per-caller control RPC throttle with configurable minimum interval and dedicated rate-limit error code

title: Add throttle tests/docs
description: Validate throttle decisions and document behavior/knobs.
close_reason: Added throttle decision tests and README documentation

title: Relay policy publication and runtime adoption
description: Persist and apply read/write relay policy updates from Nostr docs with safe runtime reload semantics.

title: Define relay policy update contract and validation rules
description: Specify how relay policy docs are validated, normalized, and rejected when unsafe/invalid.
close_reason: Implemented relay policy normalization/validation contract (ws/wss only, non-empty read/write sets, dedupe) and tests

title: Apply relay policy changes to control + DM buses at runtime
description: Wire config relay changes into runtime subscriptions/publication targets without restart where feasible.
close_reason: Applied relay policy updates to DM/control runtime publish paths via live SetRelays updates

title: Add tests for relay policy persistence and adoption
description: Validate that updated relay policies persist and are reflected in runtime behavior.
close_reason: Added tests covering relay policy normalization/validation and runtime relay-set behavior

title: Runtime relay introspection and control-plane visibility
description: Expose effective relay policy/state over control methods so operators can verify live routing behavior.

title: Add relay.policy.get control/admin method
description: Return persisted read/write relay policy and current runtime publish relay sets.
close_reason: Implemented relay.policy.get on control/admin surfaces with schema + handler support

title: Wire runtime relay snapshots from DM/control buses
description: Expose current bus relay sets via stable accessors for introspection.
close_reason: Exposed stable runtime relay snapshots via DMBus.Relays and ControlRPCBus.Relays

title: Add tests/docs for relay policy introspection
description: Cover method decoding/dispatch and daemon handler output contract.
close_reason: Added tests and docs for relay policy introspection contract

title: Optimistic concurrency ergonomics and conflict diagnostics
description: Improve optimistic write conflict handling with structured diagnostics for operators and callers.

title: Return detailed precondition conflict metadata
description: Include current version/event in conflict errors for config/list optimistic writes.
close_reason: Added detailed optimistic precondition conflict diagnostics (resource/expected/current version+event)

title: Add conflict-focused tests for control and admin method surfaces
description: Verify conflict diagnostics and status behavior for config.put and list.put.
close_reason: Added control/admin conflict tests validating status and diagnostic metadata

title: NIP-86 response compatibility hardening
description: Improve NIP-86 profile fidelity with structured error objects and stable error codes for control calls.

title: Add structured NIP-86 error model
description: Implement code/message/data error mapping for admin /call NIP-86 responses.
close_reason: Implemented structured NIP-86 error objects with stable code mapping and conflict data support

title: Add tests/docs for NIP-86 structured errors
description: Validate error mapping and document object format.
close_reason: Added tests/docs for NIP-86 structured error behavior

title: Nostr control RPC error envelope standardization
description: Align control RPC relay responses with structured error objects including stable codes and diagnostic data.

title: Add typed error propagation for control RPC bus
description: Carry code/data from handler errors into kind-38386 responses.
close_reason: Implemented typed error propagation (code/data) through control RPC bus and structured kind-38386 error envelopes

title: Add tests/docs for structured control RPC errors
description: Validate control bus error payload shape and document response contract.
close_reason: Added tests and docs for structured control RPC error payloads

title: Control RPC input hardening and abuse resistance
description: Harden inbound Nostr control RPC parsing/validation with strict decoding and payload size limits.

title: Enforce strict control request decoding
description: Reject unknown fields and malformed control request envelopes before handler dispatch.
close_reason: Implemented strict control request decoding with unknown-field rejection and method normalization

title: Add payload size limits and tests for control RPC
description: Bound control request content size and add tests/docs for rejection behavior.
close_reason: Added request size limit (64KiB) plus tests/docs for control RPC rejection behavior

title: DM transport payload hardening and limits
description: Add defensive input/output limits for DM plaintext handling to reduce abuse and malformed payload risk.

title: Enforce inbound/outbound DM plaintext limits
description: Validate DM plaintext length/content before processing or publishing.
close_reason: Enforced DM plaintext sanitization/limits for inbound processing and outbound publishing

title: Add DM payload hardening tests/docs
description: Cover rejection behavior and document size/normalization limits.
close_reason: Added DM payload hardening tests and README documentation

title: Transcript and memory payload guardrails
description: Add bounded persistence limits for transcript and memory documents to prevent oversized event payloads.

title: Enforce transcript text/meta limits before persistence
description: Validate and bound transcript entry text/meta field sizes in repository writes.
close_reason: Enforced transcript entry text/meta limits during persistence writes

title: Enforce memory text/keywords/meta limits and add tests
description: Bound memory doc payload size and add unit tests/docs for rejection behavior.
close_reason: Enforced memory payload limits (text/topic/keywords/meta) and added guardrail tests/docs

title: OpenClaw TypeScript parity program (Swarmstr Go)
description: Structured roadmap to close remaining functional gaps between swarmstr Go and current openclaw TypeScript gateway/runtime surfaces.

title: Parity blockers and contract mismatches
description: Resolve currently-known contract breaks that prevent parity-safe operation.

title: Implement signer_url bootstrap runtime path
description: Add signer abstraction and runtime flow so configs validated with signer_url are executable in daemon/CLI.
close_reason: Implemented signer_url runtime resolution (env/file/direct key) and wired daemon/CLI to execute without private_key-only requirement

title: Make status relay reporting live instead of startup snapshot
description: Source relays for /status and status.get from current runtime/config state after config.put updates.
close_reason: Implemented live relay status sourcing via StatusRelays callback for /status and status.get, wired to runtime config state

title: Replace byte slicing with UTF-8-safe truncation in request/context paths
description: Use rune-aware truncation for memory search query normalization, HTTP query capping, and provider context caps.
close_reason: Replaced byte slicing with UTF-8-safe truncation in admin query path, gateway normalize path, and provider context cap; added tests

title: Gateway protocol and websocket control-plane parity
description: Implement OpenClaw-like gateway protocol frames, websocket lifecycle, and auth/connect behaviors.

title: Define protocol schema/version + frame contracts
description: Port request/response/event frame schema patterns and versioning semantics from OpenClaw protocol schema set.
close_reason: Added gateway protocol package with protocol version negotiation, strict req/res/event frame contracts, connect/hello shapes, schema name registry, and tests

title: Implement websocket gateway runtime with auth/challenge and presence events
description: Add ws connection manager, connect flow, subscriptions, and server-side event fanout parity.
close_reason: Integrated gateway WS runtime into swarmstrd with method routing to runtime state, connect challenge+nonce auth flow, presence event fanout, strict protocol negotiation, and test coverage

title: Add connection hardening (unauthorized flood guard/rate limits)
description: Port OpenClaw-style connect-policy and unauthorized flood protections to gateway websocket runtime.
notes: Validated that unauthorized flood guard and handshake/auth rate limiting are implemented in internal/gateway/ws/runtime.go: per-IP handshake limiter (AuthRateLimitPerMin via allowHandshake), per-connection unauthorized burst tracking/close (UnauthorizedBurstMax via bumpUnauthorized/shouldClose), and trusted-proxy auth gating. Verified with focused ws tests passing.

title: Core method surface parity (health/config/sessions/chat/logs/channels/usage)
description: Expand method coverage toward OpenClaw's operational core methods and semantics.

title: Implement health/doctor/logs/channels/usage method bundle
description: Add health, doctor.memory.status, logs.tail, channels.status/logout, usage.status/cost equivalents.
notes: Executed directly. Method bundle is implemented across schema + admin /call + Nostr control RPC for: health, doctor.memory.status, logs.tail, channels.status, channels.logout, usage.status, usage.cost. Runtime semantics are wired (log buffer, channel state, usage tracker) and verified with targeted tests: TestHandleControlRPCRequest_OperationalSemantics and TestDispatchMethodCallRuntimeCallbacks.

title: Implement config.set/apply/patch/schema semantics
description: Support config mutation patterns and schema/introspection methods aligned with OpenClaw gateway behavior.
notes: Executed directly. Verified config.set/apply/patch/schema semantics are wired across schema + admin /call + Nostr control RPC. Added/expanded tests for control/admin dispatch and config mutation helpers (cmd/swarmstrd/main_test.go, internal/admin/server_test.go, internal/gateway/methods/config_mutation_test.go). go test ./... passing.

title: Implement sessions and chat parity bundle
description: Add sessions.list/preview/patch/reset/delete/compact and chat.history/chat.abort parity behaviors.
notes: Executed directly. Verified sessions/chat parity methods are implemented across schema + admin /call + Nostr control RPC for sessions.list/sessions.preview/sessions.patch/sessions.reset/sessions.delete/sessions.compact/chat.history/chat.abort. Added explicit coverage for list/preview/history in both control and admin tests (cmd/swarmstrd/main_test.go, internal/admin/server_test.go). Full go test ./... passing.

title: Agent/model/skills/tools parity
description: Port OpenClaw agent, model catalog, skills management, and tools catalog method families.

title: Implement agent + agent.wait + identity method semantics
description: Port core agent invocation/wait workflows and identity retrieval behaviors.
notes: Executed directly. Implemented agent method bundle with OpenClaw-aligned names and semantics: agent (accepted run with run_id), agent.wait (wait/timeout with status payload), and agent.identity.get. Wired across schema decoding/normalization + supported methods + admin /call dispatch + Nostr control RPC dispatch. Added in-memory agent run registry and asynchronous run execution path in swarmstrd runtime semantics. Added tests for method decode/support and both control/admin dispatch flows. Full go test ./... passing.

title: Implement agents CRUD and file management methods
description: Add agents.list/create/update/delete and agents.files.list/get/set with persistence contracts.
close_reason: Implemented agents CRUD/files methods across schema/admin/control with Nostr docs persistence and tests

title: Implement models.list + tools.catalog + skills status/install/update
description: Port discovery and management methods for models/tools/skills.
close_reason: Implemented models.list, tools.catalog, and skills status/install/update across schema/admin/control with tests

title: Node/device/pairing/cron/exec/security method parity
description: Bring parity for node and device control plane, cron automation, approvals, and secret handling methods.

title: Implement node/device pairing and token lifecycle methods
description: Port node.pair.*, device.pair.*, and device.token rotate/revoke flows with authorization checks.
close_reason: Implemented node/device pairing and token lifecycle methods, then hardened semantics and payload shapes toward OpenClaw parity (request upsert, repair semantics, sorted lists, token summary redaction, rotate/revoke rules, verify behavior) with passing tests

title: Implement node.invoke/event/result and cron method families
description: Add node.invoke pipeline plus cron.list/status/add/update/remove/run/runs behavior.
notes: Implemented node.invoke/node.event/node.result plus cron.list/status/add/update/remove/run/runs across all control surfaces. Added new method constants, request schemas, normalization and decoders in internal/gateway/methods/schema.go (including positional support where applicable). Wired admin /call dispatch and server option callbacks for all new methods. Added daemon runtime registries for node invocation lifecycle and cron job/run state, and integrated handlers in handleControlRPCRequest plus admin runtime callback wiring. Added parity tests in schema_test.go, admin/server_test.go, and cmd/swarmstrd/main_test.go. Validation passed: go test ./internal/gateway/methods ./internal/admin ./cmd/swarmstrd.
close_reason: Completed: implemented node invoke/event/result and cron method families with tests

title: Implement exec approvals, secrets, wizard, talk/voicewake/tts bundles
description: Port remaining operational method families required for OpenClaw gateway surface parity.
notes: Implemented exec approvals, secrets, wizard, talk, voicewake, and tts method bundles across schema, admin /call dispatch, and Nostr control RPC dispatch. Added in-memory runtime registries for approvals/pending resolutions, wizard session lifecycle, and talk/voicewake/tts operational state. Wired daemon admin callbacks and control handlers, added decode/dispatch/control tests, and validated with go test ./internal/gateway/methods ./internal/admin ./cmd/swarmstrd.
close_reason: Completed: implemented operational bundle methods with runtime wiring and tests

title: Parity conformance and regression harness
description: Establish executable parity checks against OpenClaw contracts and method schema fixtures.
notes: Completed through child tasks 4.6.1/4.6.2/4.6.3: parity matrix artifact + acceptance tests, behavioral parity tests for auth/rate-limit/conflict semantics (including expected_version=0 control-plane fix), and CI gating workflow/suite to prevent regressions.

title: Build method-by-method parity matrix and acceptance tests
description: Track implemented vs expected methods, params, result shapes, and error semantics with automated checks.
notes: Added executable parity matrix artifact sourced from OpenClaw gateway BASE_METHODS (docs/parity/gateway-method-parity.json, mirrored to internal/gateway/methods/testdata/parity/gateway-method-parity.json). Added acceptance test internal/gateway/methods/parity_matrix_test.go to enforce matrix consistency: unique method rows, valid status taxonomy, summary count integrity, and implemented/partial mapping validity against SupportedMethods(). Current snapshot summary: 94 OpenClaw base methods, 78 implemented, 1 partial alias, 15 missing.
close_reason: Completed parity matrix + acceptance test harness

title: Add cross-impl behavioral tests for auth, rate-limit, and conflict semantics
description: Ensure Swarmstr matches OpenClaw behavior for critical control-plane edge cases.
notes: Added parity-focused behavioral tests for control-plane edge cases and closed a discovered mismatch: (1) cmd/swarmstrd/main_test.go now validates expected_version=0 create-if-missing + conflict-on-existing semantics in control RPC list.put path; (2) internal/gateway/ws/runtime_test.go now validates HTTP 429 behavior at handshake endpoint once auth rate-limit threshold is exceeded; (3) internal/gateway/methods/nip86_test.go now asserts unauthorized/forbidden -> -32001 and method-not-found -> -32601 mappings. During execution, tests exposed control-RPC precondition drift vs admin path for expected_version=0; fixed in cmd/swarmstrd/main.go for both list.put and config.put by honoring ExpectedVersionSet and explicit zero semantics consistently.
close_reason: Completed behavioral parity tests + fixed control precondition semantics drift

title: Gate future changes on parity CI suite
description: Integrate parity test suite into CI to prevent regressions while continuing implementation.
notes: Added CI parity gate workflow at .github/workflows/parity.yml and canonical parity gate script at scripts/ci-parity.sh. Workflow now runs on push and pull_request, provisions Go from go.mod, and executes focused parity tests for method-matrix integrity, NIP-86 error mapping, WS auth/rate-limit behavior, and control/admin expected_version=0 precondition semantics. Added README section documenting local parity gate execution command. Validated locally via bash ./scripts/ci-parity.sh with all suites passing.

title: Complete websocket control-plane parity gaps
description: Follow-up from swarmstr-4.2.2: add explicit client subscription model, request method/event routing integration with daemon state, unauthorized flood guard/rate limits, and connect policy parity to OpenClaw semantics.
close_reason: Completed websocket control-plane parity gap set through swarmstr-6 and swarmstr-7: subscription model, request routing integration, connect-policy parity, trusted proxy controls, and cryptographic device signature verification.

title: Add device-identity and trusted-proxy connect policy parity
description: Continue swarmstr-5: implement OpenClaw-style connect-policy semantics for ws handshake (role/device identity requirements, trusted proxy allowances, and richer auth decision reasons).
close_reason: Added trusted-proxy auth allowances, role/device connect-policy checks (node + remote control-ui), richer auth reason/detail codes, and expanded tests

title: Implement cryptographic device signature verification in WS connect
description: Follow-up from swarmstr-6: current device policy enforces presence/nonce/timestamp but does not cryptographically verify ConnectDevice.signature against ConnectDevice.publicKey and signed payload semantics.
close_reason: Implemented cryptographic device signature verification for WS connect (device public key parsing, device-id derivation/match, v3+v2 payload verification, and rejection detail codes), plus tests for valid signature and mismatch cases.

title: Execute parity wave toward OpenClaw gateway feature coverage
description: Execution-focused roadmap to move Swarmstr from foundational parity to broad OpenClaw gateway parity, while keeping Nostr as primary transport/state backbone.

title: Parity phase A: operational/config/session/chat methods
description: Implement OpenClaw method bundle parity for health, doctor.memory.status, logs.tail, channels.status/logout, usage.status/cost, config.set/apply/patch/schema, sessions.list/preview/patch/reset/delete/compact, and chat.history/chat.abort. Ensure both /call and Nostr control ingress use identical behavior.
notes: Completed next high-leverage parity slice: optimistic precondition semantics now treat expected_version=0 as explicit create-if-missing (instead of implicit unset) for both list.put and config.put. Implementation details: added explicit ExpectedVersionSet presence tracking to ListPutRequest/ConfigPutRequest; updated object and positional precondition decoding to preserve presence; updated normalization to validate negatives only when explicitly set; updated dispatch precondition checks to use presence and enforce expected_version=0 conflict/success semantics against current existence for both list and config paths. Added tests for decoder presence tracking and runtime behavior (missing succeeds, existing conflicts) in schema_test.go and server_test.go. Validation: go test ./internal/gateway/methods ./internal/admin ./cmd/swarmstrd passed.

title: Drop-in parity closeout (execution-first)
description: Fastest path to true OpenClaw drop-in parity: close remaining gateway method gaps, enforce payload-shape/semantic parity, then finish skills/extensions/runtime-tooling parity with Nostr-native persistence semantics.

title: Close remaining gateway method contract gaps (94/94)
description: Implement remaining missing methods and aliases in schema/admin/control runtime, with tests and parity matrix updates.

title: Implement node surface parity bundle
description: Add node.list, node.describe, node.rename, node.canvas.capability.refresh, and node.invoke.result alias semantics across methods/admin/control/runtime with tests.
notes: Completed: implemented node.list/node.describe/node.rename/node.canvas.capability.refresh and node.invoke.result alias across schema decode+normalize, supported method list, admin dispatch, control-RPC dispatch, runtime apply handlers, and test coverage (schema/admin/control). Updated parity matrix entries for this bundle and validated with go test ./internal/gateway/methods ./internal/admin ./cmd/swarmstrd.

title: Implement operational missing methods bundle
description: Add tts.setProvider, exec.approval.waitDecision, skills.bins, update.run, last-heartbeat, set-heartbeats, wake, system-presence, system-event, send, browser.request across all control surfaces with tests.
notes: In progress: implemented tts.setProvider, exec.approval.waitDecision, and skills.bins end-to-end (schema decode+normalize, supported methods, admin dispatch, control-RPC dispatch, runtime apply/state helpers, and tests). Remaining methods in this bundle: update.run, last-heartbeat, set-heartbeats, wake, system-presence, system-event, send, browser.request.

title: Payload-shape + semantic parity hardening
description: Capture OpenClaw request/response/error fixtures for high-risk methods and assert Swarmstr behavior matches shape/semantics at admin and control ingress.

title: Skills + extensions parity with Nostr persistence
description: Implement OpenClaw-equivalent skills lifecycle and extension/plugin contracts, persisted via Nostr docs/lists, including install/update/runtime discovery parity.

title: Skills runtime parity and bins/install semantics
description: Match OpenClaw skills runtime inventory, bin exposure, install/update status transitions, and persisted config shape.

title: Extension/tooling parity for agent codegen/self-heal
description: Port extension lifecycle contracts and tool exposure so Swarmstr agents have OpenClaw-equivalent code generation and self-healing/modification capabilities.
